hooks.name: block-test-files
hooks.command: echo '[hook] No test/mock/stub files allowed — ValidationForge no-mock mandate'

hooks.name: evidence-gate-reminder
hooks.command: echo '[hook] Capture evidence before marking any journey complete'

hooks.name: validation-not-compilation
hooks.command: echo '[hook] Migration success is NOT validation — verify schema state against the real database'

hooks.name: db-rollback-reminder
hooks.command: echo '[hook] DB validation requires rollback testing — never assume forward-only migrations are safe'
